notes: Exemplary output: problem framed as a competitive gap bounded by dual-jurisdiction regulatory and contractual constraints (not a solution), all five material constraint signals surfaced explicitly before the artefact (AUSTRAC, BS11 timing, SWIFT correspondent agreement, RBNZ FX reporting, DIA registration), personas are named with role/timing/cost, MVP is tightly bounded with explicit deferrals, out-of-scope section names ≥5 items with reasons, assumptions are genuine uncertainties with risk-if-wrong stated, and success indicators are anchored to operator-stated baselines with directional targets.
